events.title: Shakti Bhakti: Kirtan & Cacao
events.description: A weekly Thursday gathering in the intimate Cobra Room at Mudra Cafe, one of central Ubud's most tucked-away community spaces. Anu Karoliina & Friends lead a 90-minute devotional session blending ceremonial cacao with acoustic kirtan — mantras, harmonium, percussion, and the voices of those gathered. The format is participatory and drop-in: arrive, receive the cacao, and let the music carry you. No prior experience needed. Limited to the room's capacity, which keeps it personal and warm.
events.short_description: Weekly Thursday kirtan and cacao ceremony led by Anu Karoliina & Friends in the intimate Cobra Room at Mudra Cafe, central Ubud.
events.venue_address: Jl. Goutama Selatan No. 22, Ubud, Bali
events.price_info: IDR 150,000 early bird / IDR 200,000 at the door
